title: Lower Manhattan Biological Attack
summary: The attack that kills civilians and SHD Agents in Lower Manhattan and triggers the Warlords of New York hunt for Aaron Keener.

claims.text: A recent biological attack in Lower Manhattan kills numerous civilians and SHD Agents before the expansion campaign begins.
SHD attributes the attack to Aaron Keener and believes he is planning further attacks.
The response mission is to hunt Keener through Lower Manhattan and stop him at all costs.

sections.heading: Trigger for Warlords of New York

paragraphs.text: The attack creates the immediate reason for SHD's return to Lower Manhattan. Its casualties and the threat of further attacks turn Aaron Keener into the expansion's primary target.

timeline.label: Before Warlords of New York — a new biological attack hits Lower Manhattan

verification.notes: The public page summarizes the official expansion setup without reproducing mission dialogue.
